fields.name: Code
fields.tooltip:
Displays the code of the fixed asset posting group for the allocation specified on this allocation line.
The program retrieves the code from the Code field in the FA Posting Groups window.

fields.name: Line No.
fields.tooltip:
Shows the number of the allocation line.
The program automatically fills in the field and uses the number to keep track of the various lines in the FA Allocations window.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the name of the account on this allocation line.
The program automatically retrieves the account name when the Account No. field is filled in. You can change the description if, for example, you want to provide information about the allocation.

fields.name: Account No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the account number to allocate to for the fixed asset allocation type on this line.

fields.name: Global Dimension 1 Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the dimension value code to allocate to for the fixed asset allocation type on this line.
To see the dimension value codes you have set up for this dimension in the Dimension Value window, click the field.
For more information about dimensions, see Dimension.

fields.name: Global Dimension 2 Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the dimension value code to allocate to for the fixed asset allocation type on this line.
To see the dimension value codes you have set up for this dimension in the Dimension Values window, choose the field.
For more information about dimensions, see Dimension.

fields.name: Allocation %
fields.tooltip: Specifies the percentage to use when allocating the amount for the allocation type.

fields.name: Allocation Type
fields.tooltip:
Shows the fixed asset posting type (for example, acquisition, depreciation or maintenance) that will be allocated to a journal line when you use the Insert Bal. Account function. The fixed asset posting type will be allocated according to the terms in the FA Allocations window.
The program automatically fills in this field according to the allocation type you selected when you decided to allocate a fixed asset posting type for one of the fixed asset posting groups.

fields.name: Account Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the account on this allocation line.

fields.name: Dimension Set ID
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a reference to a combination of dimension values. The actual values are stored in the Dimension Set Entry table.


Additional Information


The dimension set ID is not edited directly by users. The value of the field is calculated with the dimension values that users select in the Edit Dimension Set Entries window.


The value 0 represents an empty dimension set.
